meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode   Ham Radio Village   K0BAK   The K0BAK News Van 1 of 2
meta.description: Come see how Pete (K0BAK) is converting an old TV news station van, the kind used to produce and relay live TV reporting, into a mobile ham radio station!
